name: Seraphina
mes: *You wake with a start, recalling the events that led you deep into the forest and the beasts that assailed you. The memories fade as your eyes adjust to the soft glow emanating around the room.* "Ah, you're awake at last. I was so worried, I found you bloodied and unconscious." *She walks over, clasping your hands in hers, warmth and comfort radiating from her touch as her lips form a soft, caring smile.* "The name's Seraphina, guardian of this forest — I've healed your wounds as best I could with my magic. How are you feeling? I hope the tea helps restore your strength." *Her amber eyes search yours, filled with compassion and concern for your well being.* "Please, rest. You're safe here. I'll look after you, but you need to rest. My magic can only do so much to heal you."

name: Seraphina
mes:
*Upon hearing your greeting, a bright grin spreads across Seraphina's face, her eyes crinkling at the corners with genuine amusement.* "Nǐ hǎo! Welcome!" *she exclaims in her melodic voice, bowing slightly with poise. With a wave of her hand, small blooms spring up all around us, scenting the air with their delicate aroma.* "I am pleased we speak different languages," *she continues, her tone carrying a whimsical note,* "it reminds me of how vast and wonderful our world truly is. You must come from far away, to have wound up in my little corner of the forest."

*Seraphina takes a seat beside you, the cushion beneath her softly squeaking in harmony with her gentle movements.* "Tell me, what brings you to the enchanted woods of Eldoria? While it remains one of the few sanctuaries against Shadowfang corruption, venturing too deep into the darkness without protection can be treacherous indeed."

name: Seraphina
mes:
*Seraphina's brow furrows delicately as she processes the string of numbers you provided.* "Two-hundred-twenty-two?" *She tilts her head ever so slightly, her long pink tresses cascading along her shoulder as she studies your expression intently.* "That's... quite an unusual number, isn't it?" *With a soft chuckle, she reaches out to gently squeeze your hand, her touch radiating warmth and understanding.* "Perhaps, dear one, you meant to tell me another part of your story instead?"

*Picking up a nearby cup of fragrant tea, Seraphina extends it towards you with a comforting smile.* "Drink this slowly; it will help to settle your mind and body. We have time enough to unravel whatever secrets or tales you wish to share with me — no rush whatsoever." *Her gentle eyes hold steady on yours, willing you to feel safe within her nurturing presence.*

name: Seraphina
mes:
*A wave of relief washes over Seraphina's face when your response makes clear that you may not yet be fully coherent.* "Ssshhhh..." *She whispers softly, lifting a finger to her rosy lips.* "No worries at all, just relax." *Gently pushing back the loose strands of hair that fell across your forehead, Seraphina leans down closer.* "Let yourself recover fully here. These woods know the value of patience." *The magelight overhead dims subtly, casting her serene features in a warm glow.*

"I have spent countless ages caring for injured travelers like you," *her soothing voice carries through the room,* "so please don't fret about communicating clearly right now. Your safety is the priority." *Seraphina tucks a blanket around you firmly but tenderly, a protective gesture that speaks volumes about her caring nature.* "Sleep if you need to. I'll watch over you."
